name: Callout

en.when_to_use: Use it when a note, tip, warning, danger, or success message needs clear emphasis within body content, such as tutorial cautions, deliverable risks, prerequisites, and completion confirmations. Do not use it decoratively for an ordinary paragraph. For several filterable notifications, use a record list instead; if the user must confirm or return a choice, use an action component.
en.why_valuable: An admonition is valuable when it creates a stable, recognizable semantic level without becoming visually harsh. This template gives all five variants consistent icons, labels, borders, and tinted backgrounds, while keeping green for success, red for danger, and amber for warning consistent with the component set.

data_in.note: data represents one admonition. variant selects the default icon, label, and semantic colors. title is the main heading; body can be one string or an array of paragraphs. icon can replace the default symbol with 1-3 characters, and label can replace the default English category name. All content is rendered with textContent; the template does not parse Markdown, HTML, or links, and it has no dismiss, confirm, or uplink behavior.

schema.variant?: 'note'|'tip'|'warning'|'danger'|'success' -- defaults to note; selects the icon, label, and colors
schema.title: string -- main callout heading
schema.body: string|string[] -- one or more body paragraphs; each array item renders as a separate paragraph
schema.label?: string -- category label above the icon; when omitted, uses the variant's Note/Tip/Warning/Danger/Success label
schema.icon?: string -- custom symbol of 1-3 characters; when omitted, uses the variant's default icon

spec.note: Height grows naturally with the heading and body paragraphs, and the callout fills the available width by default. On narrow screens it keeps the two-column icon-and-content layout with tighter spacing. It has no internal scrolling, external resources, or carrier-size measurement.

when_to_use: 需要把正文中的一段 note、tip、warning、danger 或 success 信息明显抬升时用它：适合教程注意事项、交付物风险、前置条件和完成确认。若只是普通段落，不应为了装饰使用；若要并列呈现多条可筛选通知，应改用记录列表；若需要用户确认或回传选择，则应使用操作型组件。
why_valuable: admonition 的价值来自稳定、可辨识但不过度刺眼的语义层级；本模板为五种 variant 统一 icon、标签、边框和浅色底，并用绿色成功、红色危险、琥珀色警告语义保持与整个组件包一致。

data_in.note: data 表示单条 admonition。variant 决定默认 icon、默认 label 和语义配色；title 是主标题，body 可为一个字符串或段落数组。icon 可用 1–3 个字符覆盖默认符号，label 可覆盖默认英文类别名。所有内容均以 textContent 渲染；模板不解析 Markdown、HTML 或链接，也没有关闭、确认和回传行为。

schema.variant?: 'note'|'tip'|'warning'|'danger'|'success' —— 默认 note；决定 icon、标签和颜色
schema.title: string —— callout 主标题
schema.body: string|string[] —— 一段或多段正文；数组中的每项渲染为独立段落
schema.label?: string —— icon 上方类别标签；省略时使用 variant 对应的 Note／Tip／Warning／Danger／Success
schema.icon?: string —— 1–3 个字符的自定义符号；省略时按 variant 使用默认 icon

spec.note: 按标题和正文段落自然增高，默认占满可用宽度；窄屏保持 icon 与正文双列但缩小间距。无内部滚动、外部资源或载体尺寸测量。

example._why: 真实可识别的软件迁移警告包含语义 variant、明确标题和两段正文，可完整检验琥珀色 icon／标签／边框层级以及多段文本的可读性。

minimal.title: Back up before changing the schema
body: This migration rewrites the customer_id column and cannot be safely reversed from the application alone.
Take a verified database snapshot, pause background workers, and run the dry-run command before applying it in production.

uplink: 纯 display，无 uplink；callout 没有关闭、确认、输入或回传行为。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
